title: feat(node_overnight): expose --dispatch-phases CLI flag and thread to HandlerOvernight.handle()

evidence_items.evidence: src/omnimarket/nodes/node_overnight/__main__.py lines 61-71 add parser.add_argument('--dispatch-phases', action='store_true', default=False). Verified by test_dispatch_phases_flag_present_in_help which asserts '--dispatch-phases' appears in --help output.

__main__.py line 93: handler.handle(command, dispatch_phases=args.dispatch_phases). Regression-proofed by test_dispatch_phases_flag_threads_to_handler which mocks HandlerOvernight and asserts handle.call_args kwargs['dispatch_phases'] is True when flag is passed, and False when omitted.

evidence_items.description: Without flag, existing no-op sequencing behavior preserved
evidence_items.evidence: Default value is False in both argparse and HandlerOvernight.handle() signature, so unflagged callers continue to see the vacuous-green phase sequence. Asserted by the second branch of test_dispatch_phases_flag_threads_to_handler.
PR #203 merged at 2026-04-11T10:39:02Z (commit 820dcbc5d91d02349009f3bb4d88fe65b0e1d309). All CI checks green (lint, typecheck, test, CodeRabbit, CI Summary).

summary: OMN-8404 delivered --dispatch-phases CLI flag for node_overnight. The flag is exposed in argparse, threaded to HandlerOvernight.handle(dispatch_phases=...), and default behavior is preserved. Mock-based regression test asserts the kwarg is forwarded in both directions. PR #203 merged to main.
